title: (Bearish Signal) PPBT enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on May 04, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that PPBT's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 96 similar cases where PPBT's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 84 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $4.11 crossed the support line at $4.08 and is trading between $4.11 support and $4.08 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/01/21 - 05/04/21, the price experienced a -4% Downtrend. During the week of 04/27/21 - 05/04/21, the stock fell -12%.

https://preview.redd.it/6birgmn0zbx61.png?width=1521&format=png&auto=webp&s=641681a40542633b6eda4bad1d49337b2c05dd70

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 35 of 40 cases where PPBT's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 88%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on May 04, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on PPBT as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 84 of 96 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 88%.

PPBT moved below its 50-day Moving Average on April 28, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where PPBT declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 89%.

PPBT broke above its upper Bollinger Band on April 21, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

The Aroon Indicator for PPBT entered a downward trend on April 26, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.
